rationale: Gov't Code §2001.100 governs return of depositions to state agencies in contested cases. It is purely procedural and unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A deposition may be returned to the state agency before which the contested case is pending by mail or by a party interested in taking the deposition or another person.
_note: Rule text is procedural (APA deposition return); no substantive overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
